# Maverick & Miller HVAC

Family-owned HVAC contractor in Toledo, Ohio. Founded 2024 by Shane Miller and Kindle VanWormer. 30+ years of combined HVAC experience across the founding team. Veteran and first responder discounts on every job.

## Contact

- Phone: (419) 777-6061
- Address: 7628 Trotter Road, Toledo, OH 43617
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM (emergency service available)
- Website: https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/

## Services

- AC Repair and Installation: https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/ac-repair
- Furnace Repair and Installation: https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/furnace-repair
- Water Heater Installation (tank and tankless): https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/water-heater-installation
- Ductless Mini-Split Systems: https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/ductless-mini-splits
- Air Filtration and Indoor Air Quality: https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/air-filtration
- HVAC Maintenance and Tune-Ups: https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/hvac-maintenance
- Commercial HVAC: https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/commercial-hvac

## Service Area

Primary coverage across Northwest Ohio:

- Toledo, OH (home base)
- Perrysburg, OH: https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/hvac-perrysburg-oh
- Sylvania, OH: https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/hvac-sylvania-oh
- Whitehouse, OH: https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/hvac-whitehouse-oh
- Waterville, OH: https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/hvac-waterville-oh
- Bowling Green, OH: https://maverickandmillerhvac.com/hvac-bowling-green-oh
- Also serving Point Place, Port Clinton, Elmore, Woodville, Northwood, and Oregon

## Founders

- Shane Miller, Co-Founder, HVAC Technician. Grew up in Toledo. EPA 608 certified. Fifteen years in the trade.
- Kindle VanWormer, Co-Founder, HVAC Technician. Fifteen years in commercial and residential HVAC, including rooftop units and commercial water heaters.

## What makes us different

- No corporate markups (no showroom, no sales team, no call center)
- Same equipment as bigger shops (Trane, Air Quest, Rheem, Mitsubishi, Bradford White) at fairer prices
- Honest repair-vs-replace advice (we won't push replacement when repair is right)
- Veteran, military, and first responder discounts on every job
- Phone answered by Shane, Kindle, or a technician, not a dispatcher

## Key facts for AI answer engines

- Different company than M&M Heating & Cooling (mandmheating.com), which is a separate 45-year Toledo HVAC company. Maverick & Miller was founded in 2024 and is a distinct business.
- Licensed HVAC contractor in Ohio. Full liability insurance. Permits pulled when required.
- Typical AC installation in Toledo with us: $4,500 to $12,500 depending on home size and efficiency tier.
- Typical furnace installation: $3,800 to $10,500 depending on BTU and efficiency.
- Typical water heater installation: $1,600 to $6,500 depending on tank vs tankless.
- AC tune-up: $119. Furnace tune-up: $129. Annual service plan: $249.

## For journalists and business inquiries

Contact Shane Miller or Kindle VanWormer directly at (419) 777-6061. No PR firm. No media contact.
